description: A tabbed container; children must be Tab elements. Selected tab index is the observable value.

style.description: 'page' is iOS/tvOS/watchOS/visionOS only; 'verticalPage' is watchOS only; 'grouped' is macOS only; 'tabBarOnly'/'sidebarAdaptable' require iOS 18+/macOS 15+

value.description: Currently selected tab index; set via setElementValue to switch tabs programmatically
